name: Get-Package

options.name: -AllowClobber
options.description: Overrides warning messages about conflicts with existing commands. Overwrites existing commands that have the same name as commands being installed by a module.

options.name: -AllowPrereleaseVersions
options.description: Includes packages marked as a prerelease in the results.

options.name: -AllVersions
options.description: Indicates that `Get-Package` returns all available versions of the package. By default, `Get-Package` only returns the newest available version.

options.name: -Destination
options.description: Specifies the path to a directory that contains extracted package files.

options.name: -ExcludeVersion
options.description: Switch to exclude the version number in the folder path.

options.name: -Force
options.description: Forces the command to run without asking for user confirmation.

options.name: -ForceBootstrap
options.description: Indicates that `Get-Package` forces PackageManagement to automatically install the package provider.

options.name: -InstallUpdate
options.description: Indicates that this cmdlet installs updates.

options.name: -MaximumVersion
options.description: Specifies the maximum package version that you want to find.

options.name: -MinimumVersion
options.description: Specifies the minimum package version that you want to find. If a higher version is available, that version is returned.

options.name: -Name
options.description: Specifies one or more package names, or package names with wildcard characters. Separate multiple package names with commas.

options.name: -NoPathUpdate
options.description: NoPathUpdate only applies to the `Install-Script` cmdlet. NoPathUpdate is a dynamic parameter added by the provider and isn't supported by `Get-Package`.

options.name: -PackageManagementProvider
options.description: Specifies the name of a package management provider.

name: -ProviderName
-Provider
options.description: Specifies one or more package provider names. Separate multiple package provider names with commas. Use `Get-PackageProvider` to get a list of available package providers.

options.name: -RequiredVersion
options.description: Specifies the exact version of the package to find.

options.name: -Scope
options.description: Specifies the search scope for the package.

options.name: -SkipDependencies
options.description: Switch that specifies to skip finding any package dependencies.

options.name: -SkipPublisherCheck
options.description: Allows you to get a package version that is newer than your installed version. For example, an installed package that is digitally signed by a trusted publisher but a new version isn't digitally signed.

options.name: -Type
options.description: Specifies whether to search for packages with a module, a script, or either.

args.name: -Name
args.description: Specifies one or more package names, or package names with wildcard characters. Separate multiple package names with commas.

description: Returns a list of all software packages that were installed with PackageManagement .
